metadata.raw_text: {"scores": {"clarity": 5, "simplicity": 5, "brevity_economy": 5, "structure_flow": 5, "specificity_precision": 4, "humanity_voice": 4, "overall": 5}, "rationale": "Excellent memo: clear header block, concrete dates and shift times, logical progression (why → what → when → what to do). Language is plain and direct with no filler. Minor dings: specificity could improve by noting overtime/pay implications, weekend expectations, or headcount per shift—details warehouse workers would want. Voice is warm ('we appreciate your flexibility') but still leans slightly toward standard corporate tone. Overall a strong, ready-to-send memo."}

rationale: Excellent memo: clear header block, concrete dates and shift times, logical progression (why → what → when → what to do). Language is plain and direct with no filler. Minor dings: specificity could improve by noting overtime/pay implications, weekend expectations, or headcount per shift—details warehouse workers would want. Voice is warm ('we appreciate your flexibility') but still leans slightly toward standard corporate tone. Overall a strong, ready-to-send memo.
